description: Current-state infrastructure overview across VMs, Kubernetes, storage, and infrastructure services.

panels.description: Control-plane node CPU usage from node-exporter. Thresholds: gray = N/A when node/exporter is not ready; green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.

targets.expr:
((
  100 * (1 - avg by(nodename) (
  rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node-exporter",mode="idle"}[5m])
    * on(instance) group_left(nodename) max by(instance,nodename) (node_uname_info{job="node-exporter"})
))
)
or on(nodename)
(
  -1 * (max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_info, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)")) unless on(nodename) (max by(nodename) (label_replace(up{job="node-exporter"} == 1, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)")) and on(nodename) max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status="true"} == 1, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)"))))
))
  * on(nodename) group_left() max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"}, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)"))

panels.description: Control-plane node RAM usage from node-exporter. Thresholds: gray = N/A when node/exporter is not ready; green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.
Control-plane pod slot usage per node, calculated as used pods / allocatable pods. Thresholds: gray = N/A when node is not ready; green < 70%; yellow >= 70% and < 90%; red >= 90%.

targets.expr: (100 * count by(node) ((kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1) * on(namespace,pod) group_left(node) max by(namespace,pod,node) (kube_pod_info)) / clamp_min(sum by(node) (kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="pods"}), 1) or on(node) (-1 * (max by(node) (kube_node_info) unless on(node) max by(node) (kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status="true"} == 1)))) * on(node) group_left() kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"}

panels.description: Worker node CPU usage from node-exporter. Thresholds: gray = N/A when node/exporter is not ready; green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.

targets.expr:
((
  100 * (1 - avg by(nodename) (
  rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node-exporter",mode="idle"}[5m])
    * on(instance) group_left(nodename) max by(instance,nodename) (node_uname_info{job="node-exporter"})
))
)
or on(nodename)
(
  -1 * (max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_info, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)")) unless on(nodename) (max by(nodename) (label_replace(up{job="node-exporter"} == 1, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)")) and on(nodename) max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status="true"} == 1, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)"))))
))
  unless on(nodename) max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"}, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)"))

panels.description: Worker node RAM usage from node-exporter. Thresholds: gray = N/A when node/exporter is not ready; green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.
Worker pod slot usage per node, calculated as used pods / allocatable pods. Thresholds: gray = N/A when node is not ready; green < 70%; yellow >= 70% and < 90%; red >= 90%.

targets.expr: (100 * count by(node) ((kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1) * on(namespace,pod) group_left(node) max by(namespace,pod,node) (kube_pod_info)) / clamp_min(sum by(node) (kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="pods"}), 1) or on(node) (-1 * (max by(node) (kube_node_info) unless on(node) max by(node) (kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status="true"} == 1)))) unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"}

panels.description: Worker CPU aggregate. Usage is compared with worker CPU capacity; requests and limits are compared with worker CPU allocatable. Limits can exceed allocatable. Bar color uses percent of each bar max: green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.

targets.expr: label_replace((sum(((1 - rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node-exporter",mode="idle"}[5m])) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) max by(instance,nodename) (node_uname_info{job="node-exporter"})) unless on(nodename) max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"}, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)")))), "Type", "Workers CPU usage", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="cpu"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers CPU requests", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="cpu"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers CPU limits", "__name__", ".*")

label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_capacity{resource="cpu"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers CPU usage", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="cpu"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers CPU requests", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="cpu"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers CPU limits", "__name__", ".*")
label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_capacity{resource="cpu"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers total CPU", "__name__", ".*")

panels.description: Informational worker CPU capacity total from kube_node_status_capacity. No warning threshold is applied.

Worker RAM aggregate. Usage is compared with worker node memory total; requests and limits are compared with worker memory allocatable. Limits can exceed allocatable. Bar color uses percent of each bar max: green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.

targets.expr: label_replace((sum(((node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="node-exporter"} - node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{job="node-exporter"}) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) max by(instance,nodename) (node_uname_info{job="node-exporter"})) unless on(nodename) max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"}, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)")))), "Type", "Workers memory usage", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="memory"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers memory requests", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="memory"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers memory limits", "__name__", ".*")

label_replace((sum((node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="node-exporter"} * on(instance) group_left(nodename) max by(instance,nodename) (node_uname_info{job="node-exporter"})) unless on(nodename) max by(nodename) (label_replace(kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"}, "nodename", "$1", "node", "(.*)")))), "Type", "Workers memory usage", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers memory requests", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers memory limits", "__name__", ".*")
label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_capacity{resource="memory"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers total RAM", "__name__", ".*")

panels.description: Informational worker RAM capacity total from kube_node_status_capacity. No warning threshold is applied.

Worker pod capacity and workload signals. Workers pods used is compared with worker allocatable pods: green < 50%, yellow >= 50% and < 80%, red >= 80%. Problem pods: green = 0, yellow > 0 and <= 10% of worker allocatable pods, red > 10%. Warning events (last 30'): green = 0, yellow > 0 and <= 10% of worker allocatable pods, red > 10%.

targets.expr: label_replace((sum(count by(node) ((kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1) * on(namespace,pod) group_left(node) max by(namespace,pod,node) (kube_pod_info)) unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers pods used", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((count(kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",phase=~"Failed|Unknown|Pending"} == 1) or on() vector(0)), "Type", "Problem pods", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((sum(increase(kube_event_count{type="Warning",namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}"}[30m])) or on() vector(0)), "Type", "Warning events (last 30')", "__name__", ".*")

label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="pods"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers pods used", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((0.1 * sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="pods"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Problem pods", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace((0.1 * sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="pods"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Warning events (last 30')", "__name__", ".*")
label_replace((sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="pods"} unless on(node) kube_node_role{role=~"control-plane|master"})), "Type", "Workers total pods", "__name__", ".*")

panels.description: Informational worker pod slot total from kube_node_status_allocatable. No warning threshold is applied.

targets.expr: ceph_health_status{}

panels.description: Ceph health status from ceph_health_status. Thresholds and mappings: 0 = HEALTHY/green; 1 = WARNING/yellow; 2 = ERROR/red; no data = N/A.

targets.expr: 100 * sum((ceph_osd_up{} == 1) and on(ceph_daemon,cluster,namespace) (ceph_osd_in{} == 1)) / clamp_min(count(ceph_osd_up{}), 1)

panels.description: Ceph OSD availability, percentage of OSDs that are both in and up. Thresholds: red < 80%; yellow >= 80% and < 100%; green = 100%.

targets.expr: 100 * ((count(ceph_mgr_status{}) > bool 0) * (sum(ceph_mgr_status{}) == bool 1))

panels.description: Ceph manager availability. Thresholds: red < 100%; green = 100%.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(ceph_mon_quorum_status{}) / clamp_min(count(ceph_mon_quorum_status{}), 1)

panels.description: Ceph monitor quorum coverage. Thresholds: red < 100%; green = 100%.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(ceph_cluster_total_used_bytes{}) / clamp_min(sum(ceph_cluster_total_bytes{}), 1)

panels.description: Ceph storage usage. Thresholds: green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.

targets.expr: sum(irate(ceph_pool_rd_bytes[5m])) / 1000000

panels.description: Ceph read bandwidth in MB/s. Informational throughput panel; no warning threshold is applied.

targets.expr: sum(irate(ceph_pool_wr_bytes[5m])) / 1000000

panels.description: Ceph write bandwidth in MB/s. Informational throughput panel; no warning threshold is applied.

targets.expr:
(
  label_replace(
    100 * sum by(namespace) (kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace=~"s3|kafka"})
      / clamp_min(sum by(namespace) (kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace=~"s3|kafka"}), 1),
    "workload", "$1 total", "namespace", "(.*)"
  )
)
or
(
  label_replace(
    100 * sum by(namespace,persistentvolumeclaim) (kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace!~"s3|kafka",persistentvolumeclaim=~".+-postgres-data"})
      / clamp_min(sum by(namespace,persistentvolumeclaim) (kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace!~"s3|kafka",persistentvolumeclaim=~".+-postgres-data"}), 1),
    "workload", "$1 postgres", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.+)-postgres-data"
  )
)
or
(
  label_replace(
    100 * sum by(namespace,persistentvolumeclaim) (kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace!~"s3|kafka",persistentvolumeclaim!~".+-postgres-data",persistentvolumeclaim=~".+-data"})
      / clamp_min(sum by(namespace,persistentvolumeclaim) (kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace!~"s3|kafka",persistentvolumeclaim!~".+-postgres-data",persistentvolumeclaim=~".+-data"}), 1),
    "workload", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.+)-data"
  )
)
or
(
  label_replace(
    100 * sum by(namespace,persistentvolumeclaim) (kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace!~"s3|kafka",persistentvolumeclaim!~".+-data"})
      / clamp_min(sum by(namespace,persistentvolumeclaim) (kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"${infra_namespaces:raw}",namespace!~"s3|kafka",persistentvolumeclaim!~".+-data"}), 1),
    "workload", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.+)"
  )
)

panels.description: PVC usage in the selected infrastructure sections. Thresholds: green < 50%; yellow >= 50% and < 80%; red >= 80%.
Workload readiness grouped by app.kubernetes.io/part-of across Deployments, StatefulSets, and DaemonSets. Thresholds: green = 100% ready; red < 100% ready.

title: Infrastructure: overview
